name: Study Room video search returns results and a result loads the player
description: The user searches for an educational topic in the Study Room, sees a list of video results related to the query, and selecting one loads the video player workspace.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the Study Room link in the sidebar
Type the search term 'linear algebra' into the video search field

Verify a list of video result items appears, each showing a video title and thumbnail, with the titles plausibly related to the search term — or, if the video API key is not configured, a clear message explaining search is unavailable rather than a silent blank area
Verify a video player workspace loads for the selected video (an embedded player region with a notes/transcript area), confirming results are selectable and not static
